description_long: This object depicts a modern beachfront residential complex composed of several single-story houses arranged in a linear fashion parallel to a sandy shoreline. The houses are separated by lush green lawns and palm trees, with pathways connecting each unit to communal amenities. A large rectangular swimming pool and a central gathering area are situated towards the rear, surrounded by landscaped gardens and lounge chairs. The complex features a mix of private and shared outdoor spaces, including patios and sunbathing areas along the water. The buildings have flat roofs, clean lines, and a minimalist aesthetic, with light-colored facades and large windows. The overall layout emphasizes open space, relaxation, and direct access to the beach.
description: A modern beachfront residential complex with single-story houses, flat roofs, palm trees, and a central pool, arranged along a sandy shoreline.
description_view_0: Front view showing the row of houses facing the beach, palm trees, and sun loungers along the water.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the linear arrangement of houses, the green lawns, and the proximity to the beach.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the central pool, communal areas, and the back entrances of the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the houses, pathways, and the landscaped communal spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows facing the beach
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryways with minimal steps, flat overhangs, and direct access from pathways
